---
title: \{SET\}~group~ Junction
author: Kyle P Messier
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
link-citations: yes
output:
  rmdformats::downcute:
    self_contained: true
    thumbnails: true
    lightbox: false
    gallery: false
    toc: 1
    default_style: dark
    css: NIEHS.css
  pdf_document:
    toc: yes=
    toc_depth: '2'    
---




## [Reproducible Research](Reproducible_Research.html)

## [High Performance Computing](Scientific_Computing.html)

## [Overleaf - $\LaTeX$](Overleaf.html)

## [Project Management](Project_Management.html)

## [SET group logo](SETlogo.html)
